en: On my bed by nightI sought him whom my soul loves; I sought him, but found him not.
zh: 我夜間躺在床上， 尋找我心所愛的， 我尋找他，卻找不到他。

en: I will rise now and go about the city, in the streets and in the squares; I will seek him whom my soul loves. I sought him, but found him not.
zh: 我說：“我要起來，走遍全城， 在街上，在廣場上， 尋找我心所愛的。” 我尋找他，卻找不到他。

en: The watchmen found me as they went about in the city. "Have you seen him whom my soul loves?"
zh: 城中的守衛巡邏的時候，找著我； 我就問他們：“你們有沒有看見我心所愛的？”

en: Scarcely had I passed them when I found him whom my soul loves. I held him, and would not let him go until I had brought him into my mother's house, and into the chamber of her who conceived me.
zh: 我剛剛離開他們， 就遇見我心所愛的； 我把他拉住，不讓他走， 等到我帶他到我母親的家， 進到懷我者的內室。

en: I adjure you, O daughters of Jerusalem, by the gazelles or the does of the field, that you not stir up or awaken love until it pleases.
zh: 耶路撒冷的眾女子啊！ 我指著羚羊、田間的母鹿懇求你們， 不要激動，不要挑動愛情， 等它自發吧。

en: What is that coming up from the wilderness like columns of smoke, perfumed with myrrh and frankincense, with all the fragrant powders of a merchant?
zh: 那從曠野上來， 好像煙柱； 用商人販賣的各種香粉、 沒藥和乳香薰過的，是誰呢？

en: Behold, it is the litter of Solomon! Around it are sixty mighty men, some of the mighty men of Israel,
zh: 看哪！是所羅門的御轎， 四周有六十個勇士， 都是以色列中的勇士。

en: all of them wearing swords and expert in war, each with his sword at his thigh, against terror by night.
zh: 個個手拿武器，能征慣戰； 各人腿上配有利劍，以防夜間的襲擊。

en: King Solomon made himself a carriage from the wood of Lebanon.
zh: 所羅門王用黎巴嫩木， 為自己做了一乘華轎。

en: He made its posts of silver, its back of gold, its seat of purple; its interior was inlaid with love by the daughters of Jerusalem.
zh: 他用銀子做轎柱， 用金子做轎底， 用紫色料子做轎的座墊； 內部所鋪設的， 是耶路撒冷眾女子的愛情。

en: Go out, O daughters of Zion, and look upon King Solomon, with the crown with which his mother crowned him on the day of his wedding, on the day of the gladness of his heart.
zh: 錫安的眾女子啊！ 你們出來看看所羅門戴著的冠冕， 就是在他結婚的日子， 在他心裡喜樂的時候， 他母親給他戴上的。
